testcase.name: test_add_txt_record

failure.message: urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock

testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record>
def test_add_txt_record(self): """add_txt_record with normal params should succeed""" self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[ { "id": 654321, "account_id": 1234, "service_id": 14, "service_name": "domain", "customer_name": DOMAIN, } ], ) self._register_response("/1/domain/654321/dns/record", "1001234", "POST") > self.client.add_txt_record( DOMAIN, self.record_name, self.record_content, self.record_ttl )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:129: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:212: in add_txt_record (domain_id, domain_name) = self._find_zone(domain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:192: in _find_zone result = self._get_request( certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:97: in _get_request response = self.http.request('GET', url, fields=payload, headers=self.headers) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:135: in request return self.request_encode_url( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:182: in request_encode_url return self.urlopen(method, url, **extra_kw) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:446: in urlopen conn = self.connection_from_host(u.host, port=u.port, scheme=u.scheme) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:317: in connection_from_host return self.connection_from_context(request_context) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <urllib3.poolmanager.PoolManager object at 0x115152fd0> request_context = {'host': 'endpoint', 'port': 80, 'scheme': 'mock'}
def connection_from_context( self, request_context: dict[str, typing.Any] ) -> HTTPConnectionPool: """ Get a :class:`urllib3.connectionpool.ConnectionPool` based on the request context.
``request_context`` must at least contain the ``scheme`` key and its value must be a key in ``key_fn_by_scheme`` instance variable. """ if "strict" in request_context: warnings.warn( "The 'strict' parameter is no longer needed on Python 3+. " "This will raise an error in urllib3 v2.1.0.", DeprecationWarning, ) request_context.pop("strict")
scheme = request_context["scheme"].lower() pool_key_constructor = self.key_fn_by_scheme.get(scheme) if not pool_key_constructor: > raise URLSchemeUnknown(scheme) E urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:339: URLSchemeUnknown

testcase.name: test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate

failure.message: urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock

testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate>
def test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate(self): """add_txt_record with wrong token should fail""" self._register_error( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), "not_authorized", "Authorization required", ) with self.assertRaises(PluginError): > self.client.add_txt_record( DOMAIN, self.record_name, self.record_content, self.record_ttl )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:152: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:212: in add_txt_record (domain_id, domain_name) = self._find_zone(domain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:192: in _find_zone result = self._get_request( certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:97: in _get_request response = self.http.request('GET', url, fields=payload, headers=self.headers) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:135: in request return self.request_encode_url( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:182: in request_encode_url return self.urlopen(method, url, **extra_kw) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:446: in urlopen conn = self.connection_from_host(u.host, port=u.port, scheme=u.scheme) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:317: in connection_from_host return self.connection_from_context(request_context) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def connection_from_context( self, request_context: dict[str, typing.Any] ) -> HTTPConnectionPool: """ Get a :class:`urllib3.connectionpool.ConnectionPool` based on the request context.
``request_context`` must at least contain the ``scheme`` key and its value must be a key in ``key_fn_by_scheme`` instance variable. """ if "strict" in request_context: warnings.warn( "The 'strict' parameter is no longer needed on Python 3+. " "This will raise an error in urllib3 v2.1.0.", DeprecationWarning, ) request_context.pop("strict")
scheme = request_context["scheme"].lower() pool_key_constructor = self.key_fn_by_scheme.get(scheme) if not pool_key_constructor: > raise URLSchemeUnknown(scheme) E urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:339: URLSchemeUnknown

testcase.name: test_add_txt_record_fail_to_find_domain

failure.message: urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock

testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record_fail_to_find_domain>
def test_add_txt_record_fail_to_find_domain(self): """add_txt_record with non existing domain should fail""" self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[], ) with self.assertRaises(PluginError): > self.client.add_txt_record( DOMAIN, self.record_name, self.record_content, self.record_ttl )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:140: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:212: in add_txt_record (domain_id, domain_name) = self._find_zone(domain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:192: in _find_zone result = self._get_request( certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:97: in _get_request response = self.http.request('GET', url, fields=payload, headers=self.headers) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:135: in request return self.request_encode_url( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:182: in request_encode_url return self.urlopen(method, url, **extra_kw) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:446: in urlopen conn = self.connection_from_host(u.host, port=u.port, scheme=u.scheme) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:317: in connection_from_host return self.connection_from_context(request_context) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def connection_from_context( self, request_context: dict[str, typing.Any] ) -> HTTPConnectionPool: """ Get a :class:`urllib3.connectionpool.ConnectionPool` based on the request context.
``request_context`` must at least contain the ``scheme`` key and its value must be a key in ``key_fn_by_scheme`` instance variable. """ if "strict" in request_context: warnings.warn( "The 'strict' parameter is no longer needed on Python 3+. " "This will raise an error in urllib3 v2.1.0.", DeprecationWarning, ) request_context.pop("strict")
scheme = request_context["scheme"].lower() pool_key_constructor = self.key_fn_by_scheme.get(scheme) if not pool_key_constructor: > raise URLSchemeUnknown(scheme) E urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:339: URLSchemeUnknown

testcase.name: test_del_txt_record

failure.message: urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock

testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_del_txt_record>
def test_del_txt_record(self): """del_txt_record with normal params should succeed""" self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[ { "id": "654321", "account_id": "1234", "service_id": "14", "service_name": "domain", "customer_name": DOMAIN, } ], ) self._register_response( "/1/domain/654321/dns/record", [ { "id": "11110", "source": ".", "source_idn": DOMAIN, "type": "NS", "ttl": 3600, "target": "ns1.death.star", }, { "id": "11111", "source": self.record_name, "source_idn": "{name}.{domain}".format(name=self.record_name, domain=DOMAIN), "type": "TXT", "ttl": self.record_ttl, "target": self.record_content, }, ], ) self._register_response( "/1/domain/654321/dns/record/11111", True, "DELETE", ) > self.client.del_txt_record( DOMAIN, "{name}.{domain}".format(name=self.record_name, domain=DOMAIN), self.record_content, )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:196: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:229: in del_txt_record (domain_id, domain_name) = self._find_zone(domain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:192: in _find_zone result = self._get_request( certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak.py:97: in _get_request response = self.http.request('GET', url, fields=payload, headers=self.headers) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:135: in request return self.request_encode_url( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/_request_methods.py:182: in request_encode_url return self.urlopen(method, url, **extra_kw) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:446: in urlopen conn = self.connection_from_host(u.host, port=u.port, scheme=u.scheme) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:317: in connection_from_host return self.connection_from_context(request_context) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <urllib3.poolmanager.PoolManager object at 0x11546da30> request_context = {'host': 'endpoint', 'port': 80, 'scheme': 'mock'}
def connection_from_context( self, request_context: dict[str, typing.Any] ) -> HTTPConnectionPool: """ Get a :class:`urllib3.connectionpool.ConnectionPool` based on the request context.
``request_context`` must at least contain the ``scheme`` key and its value must be a key in ``key_fn_by_scheme`` instance variable. """ if "strict" in request_context: warnings.warn( "The 'strict' parameter is no longer needed on Python 3+. " "This will raise an error in urllib3 v2.1.0.", DeprecationWarning, ) request_context.pop("strict")
scheme = request_context["scheme"].lower() pool_key_constructor = self.key_fn_by_scheme.get(scheme) if not pool_key_constructor: > raise URLSchemeUnknown(scheme) E urllib3.exceptions.URLSchemeUnknown: Not supported URL scheme mock
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/poolmanager.py:339: URLSchemeUnknown

``request_context`` must at least contain the ``scheme`` key and its value must be a key in ``key_fn_by_scheme`` instance variable.
